_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: OLN93 cells closed the scratch by 37.8 ± 5.2% when transfected with a control vector and they filled up the scratch by 23.1 ± 2.9% when transfected with Nf2...a 10% reduction in OLN93 cells
details: NF2 overexpression reduced scratch closure from 37.8±5.2% to 23.1±2.9% and caused 10% reduction in cell path length over 30 hours
